UW-2  SERVICE RESTRICTIONS ON WELDED VESSELS. (a) Welded joints in vessels subject to direct firing or lethal service shall meet the special requirements of this paragraph. (b) All butt welds shall be fully radiographed in accordance with UW-11. The joint efficiency factor E shall be as required by UW-12. (c) Welders shall be qualified as required by QW-300. Unless exempted by this paragraph, vessels in lethal service shall use Type No. 1 joints per UW-3. See also UG-22 for design loads. Subject to the applicable material group, UCS-23 or UHA-23 shall govern stress.
